title: RiWeCIS – Supporting Datasets
author: Panozzo, Silvia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains supporting datasets produced within the PRIN project “RiWeCIS”, funded by the Italian Ministry of University and Research (MUR). 
 Due to Zenodo platform limitations, the repository is provided as a compressed (.zip) archive in order to preserve the original folder structure. Users are required to extract (unzip) the archive to properly access and navigate its contents. 
 The archive is organized into two main subfolders: 
 1. Supporting data WP2   2. Supporting data WP3   
 ---------------------------------------- Supporting data WP2 ---------------------------------------- 
 This folder contains datasets related to Work Package 2. 
 It includes: 
 - Sequence alignments in FASTA format for the ALS and PDS genes of the species involved in the project, organized into monocots and dicots   - Data from in silico analysis of potential siRNAs, generated using the siRNA Wizard tool (https://www.invivogen.com/sirnawizard)   - Real-time PCR (qPCR) data, including:   - Calibration curves     - Melting curves     - Primer sequences   
 ---------------------------------------- Supporting data WP3 ---------------------------------------- 
 This folder contains datasets related to Work Package 3. 
 It includes: 
 - Physicochemical characterization data of the nanoparticles used in the project   - Results from whole-plant assays of the nano-encapsulated herbicide   
 ---------------------------------------- 
 All materials are provided to support transparency and reproducibility of the research results associated with the PRIN project “RiWeCIS”.
